name: HTS_LABOR_DEMAND_VIEW
query: select prfl.demand_date, prfl.scheduler_profile_id, nvl(dated.value, prfl.resources_required) resources_required from hts_labor_demand_prfl_dated_v prfl left outer join hts_labor_demand_vals dated on trunc(dated.from_date) = prfl.demand_date and prfl.scheduler_profile_id = dated.sched_profile_id
